TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Al_Bonniwell, title = Al_Bonniwell, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Al_Bonniwell} }

S.FORM: Al Bonniwell sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1911, ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 10, Al Bonniwell, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2002) pinqbaqan nya Al Bonniwell mqwas biru sa Lower Merion pqwsan biru seneng, Ardmore, Pennsylvania, U.S. Al Bonniwell, t'aring kawas tay 1932 tehuk kawas tay 1935, mqwas biru sa Dartmouth pqwsan biru krahu, Hanover, New Hampshire, United States. qnxan nya Al Bonniwell maki tay kawas 1949 msqun ki Maxine (1922–2007). mintzyuwaw nya Al Bonniwell sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. maki sa kawas 1937, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na NBA. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Al Bonniwell sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1911, ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 10, Al Bonniwell, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2002) pinqbaqan nya Al Bonniwell mqwas biru sa Lower Merion pqwsan biru seneng, Ardmore, Pennsylvania, U.S. Al Bonniwell, t'aring kawas tay 1932 tehuk kawas tay 1935, mqwas biru sa Dartmouth pqwsan biru krahu, Hanover, New Hampshire, United States. qnxan nya Al Bonniwell maki tay kawas 1949 msqun ki Maxine (1922–2007). mintzyuwaw nya Al Bonniwell sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. maki sa kawas 1937, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na NBA. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: al βonniwell s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, al βonniwell, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) pinqβaqan nja al βonniwell mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa lower merion pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ, ar*more, penns~ɕjl*ania, u.s~ɕ. al βonniwell, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk kawas~ɕ taj ****, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa *artmoutħ pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu, ħano*er, new ħamps~ɕħire, unite* s~ɕtates~ɕ. qnxan nja al βonniwell maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki maxine (*********). mintzjuwaw nja al βonniwell s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na nβa. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
